hero.name: I'm Yaroslav Radchuk
hero.bio: Experienced frontend developer specializing in Vue.js, React, and TypeScript. Building scalable, high-performance web applications — from architecture to production.

about.heading: Who I am.
about.body: With a background in Computer Science, I've spent 6 years building complex frontend products — from SaaS platforms and CRM systems to real-time applications and SSR-optimized Nuxt apps. I specialize in Vue.js and React, writing maintainable, well-tested code and contributing to architecture decisions, code reviews, and team mentoring.

highload.title: High-Load Platforms
highload.description: SaaS products built for high-traffic environments. Focus on bundle optimization, runtime performance, and scalable component architecture.

crm.title: CRM Systems
crm.description: Complex user flows, data-driven dashboards, membership and subscription logic for business-critical products.

realtime.title: Real-Time Features
realtime.description: WebSockets integration, live data feeds, and real-time UI updates for interactive and collaborative products.

nuxt.title: Nuxt / SSR Apps
nuxt.description: Server-side rendering, static generation, and SEO-optimized applications built with Nuxt and advanced routing.

spa.title: SPA Landing Pages
spa.description: Fast, visually rich single-page landing experiences with smooth animations, scroll reveals, and conversion-focused UI.

bullets: Enterprise SaaS with Vue.js, TypeScript, Composition API, Pinia
Authentication, dashboards, subscriptions, membership logic for high-traffic products
Performance optimization: bundle size and runtime efficiency
Cross-functional collaboration: design, backend, QA, stakeholders
Built Vue.js project from scratch — architecture design and core business features
Led code reviews, mentored developers, facilitated onboarding
High code quality, maintainability, and business alignment
Responsive web applications with Vue.js and React.js
Semantic HTML/CSS, cross-browser testing and debugging
Agile collaboration with designers, developers, and product teams
